info.title: Paperclip API
info.description: REST API for the Paperclip AI agent management platform

BoardSessionAuth.name: paperclip_session
BoardSessionAuth.description: Board session cookie in authenticated mode. Paperclip uses Better Auth; cookie transport may vary by deployment.

BoardApiKeyAuth.description: Board API key presented in the Authorization bearer header.

AgentBearerAuth.bearerFormat: Agent API Key or Agent JWT
AgentBearerAuth.description: Agent API key or Paperclip-issued local agent JWT presented in the Authorization bearer header.

adapterType.description: Known built-in adapters: process, http, claude_local, codex_local, gemini_local, opencode_local, pi_local, cursor, openclaw_gateway. External adapters may register additional non-empty string types at runtime.

Known built-in adapters: process, http, claude_local, codex_local, gemini_local, opencode_local, pi_local, cursor, openclaw_gateway. External adapters may register additional non-empty string types at runtime.
